name: steelerubber.com
message:
Automotive Service & Collision Repair.

“Steele Rubber Products is a manufacturer of auto weatherstrip and rubber parts to fit classic cars, trucks, and hot rods since the mid 1960's. They supply high quality windshields, doors, windows, hoods and trunk parts as well as hard to find products such as gaskets, pedal pads, fuel systems parts and bumpers.”
